name: test_section_remapping
description:
Section block_indices are remapped after merge.

Blocks 0 and 2 ("Dup") merge into winner at new index 0.
Block 1 ("Solo") becomes new index 1.
Section "First" [0, 1] → [0, 1], Section "Second" [2] → [0].
